settings.custom_liquid: 📌 Made in USA

settings.heading: Ideas to engrave:
settings.content:
First Letter (A+B, A ♡ B)

Names (Rachel ♥ Ross)

Special Date (∞ 01/05/2014 ∞)

Forever & Always

You & Me Forever

I Love You Forever

You can use letters, numbers, roman numerals, and symbols (♥❤♡✿❀✽✪★✯☆☘☾∞) but emojis are not possible. The preview serves as an orientation, deviations are possible.

settings.heading: Shipping information
settings.content:
All orders are expertly packaged, prepared, and shipped within 1-3 days of ordering. Please note that each of our bracelets are custom and handmade, and take us some time to create and package each order.

We offer Fast Shipping Worldwide and the typical delivery timeframe is 7-12 days. Depending on your location, you may receive items later or earlier.

All orders are shipped with the tracking number so you can track them every step of the way! Occasionally, packages may face delays beyond our control, such as customs or postal delays so please kindly understand. 

If you have any issues tracking your order, please reach out to us at 'support@oribask.com'

settings.heading: 30-Day Money Back Guarantee
settings.content: We think that our products make a difference in people's lives, and we stand behind them completely. All of our items come with a 30-day money-back guarantee. We will do everything we can to ensure you have a positive experience with Oribask!

custom_css: .product__title h1 {text-align: center; font-size: 33px; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; letter-spacing: -0.025em; line-height: 1; word-break: break-word; text-transform: uppercase;}
.h4 {font-size: 75%; font-weight: 700; white-space: nowrap; vertical-align: baseline; border-radius: 0.25em;}
